data.title: test-harvest-worktree.sh: test_complete_comment_written_on_success only checks for :landed presence not fail-silent pattern
data.description: The test_end_session_landed_after_merge test checks end-session/SKILL.md for :landed signal but does not verify the fail-silent guard pattern is present. The SKILL.md includes '(Only when TICKET_ID context is available. Skip silently if not set.)' but there is no corresponding structural test verifying this pattern. Minor coverage gap found during code review of 16f8-4b57.
